251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I fought a man in single combat on the Day of Hunayn, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave me the spoils of the slain.'
251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertarung satu lawan satu dengan seorang lelaki pada Perang Hunain, dan Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan kepadaku harta rampasan dari yang terbunuh itu.'

252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to tilt the vessel for the cat to drink. He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ informed us that it is not impure; it is among those who go around among you.'
252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia biasa memiringkan wadah agar kucing bisa minum. Ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberitahu kami bahwa kucing itu tidak najis; ia termasuk hewan yang berkeliaran di sekitar kalian.'

253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When one of you enters the mosque, let him pray two rak'ahs before sitting.'
253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian masuk masjid, hendaklah ia shalat dua rakaat sebelum duduk.'

254.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that fasting the Day of 'Ashura' expiates one year.
254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa puasa pada Hari Asyura menghapus dosa satu tahun.

255.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ leading the people in prayer while carrying Umamah bint Abi al-'As. When he bowed, he put her down; and when he finished the prostration, he lifted her up.'
255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mengimami orang-orang shalat sambil menggendong Umamah binti Abi al-'As. Ketika ruku, beliau meletakkannya; dan ketika selesai sujud, beliau mengangkatnya.'

256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the call to prayer is given, do not stand until you see me.'
256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila azan dikumandangkan, janganlah kalian berdiri hingga kalian melihatku.'

257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you drinks, let him not breathe into the vessel. When he goes to the toilet, let him not touch his private part with his right hand. And when he cleanses himself, let him not do so with his right hand.'
257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian minum, janganlah ia bernapas ke dalam wadah. Apabila ia pergi ke tempat buang hajat, janganlah ia menyentuh kemaluannya dengan tangan kanannya. Dan apabila ia bercebok, janganlah ia melakukannya dengan tangan kanannya.'

258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fasting the Day of 'Arafah expiates two years — the past and the coming — and fasting the Day of 'Ashura' expiates the past year.'
258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Puasa pada Hari Arafah menghapus dua tahun — yang lalu dan yang akan datang — dan puasa pada Hari Asyura menghapus tahun yang lalu.'

259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by a funeral and said: 'One who is resting and one from whom others are resting.' They asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is one who is resting and one from whom others are resting?' He said: 'The believing servant rests from the toil and harm of this world into the mercy of Allah the Most High. The wicked servant — the servants, the lands, the trees, and the animals are all relieved of him.'
259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewati sebuah jenazah dan bersabda: 'Seseorang yang beristirahat dan seseorang yang orang lain beristirahat darinya.' Mereka bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa yang beristirahat dan yang orang lain beristirahat darinya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Hamba yang beriman beristirahat dari kepayahan dan gangguan dunia menuju rahmat Allah Yang Mahatinggi. Hamba yang jahat — para hamba, negeri-negeri, pepohonan, dan binatang-binatang semuanya merasa lega darinya.'

260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about his fasting and became angry. 'Umar said: 'We are pleased with Allah as our Lord, with Islam as our religion, and with Muhammad as our messenger.' He then mentioned fasting every other day: the Prophet ﷺ said: 'That is the fasting of my brother Dawud.' He was asked about fasting on Mondays and Thursdays, and he said: 'That is the day I was born and the day revelation was sent down to me.' He was asked about fasting three days of every month and from Ramadan to Ramadan.
260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang puasanya dan beliau marah. 'Umar berkata: 'Kami ridha dengan Allah sebagai Tuhan kami, Islam sebagai agama kami, dan Muhammad sebagai rasul kami.' Kemudian disebutkan puasa selang-seling: Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Itu adalah puasa saudaraku Dawud.' Beliau ditanya tentang puasa Senin dan Kamis, dan beliau bersabda: 'Itulah hari aku dilahirkan dan hari wahyu diturunkan kepadaku.' Beliau ditanya tentang puasa tiga hari setiap bulan dan dari Ramadan ke Ramadan.

261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say from this pulpit: O people, beware of narrating too many things from me. Whoever speaks about me, let him say nothing but what is true and accurate. Whoever attributes to me what I did not say, let him take his seat in the Fire.'
261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda dari mimbar ini: Wahai manusia, berhati-hatilah dari terlalu banyak meriwayatkan dariku. Barangsiapa berbicara tentangku, hendaklah ia tidak mengucapkan kecuali yang benar dan akurat. Barangsiapa menisbatkan kepadaku apa yang tidak aku ucapkan, hendaklah ia mengambil tempat duduknya di neraka.'

262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to let us hear a verse occasionally in the Zuhr and 'Asr prayers.
262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memperdengarkan satu ayat kepada kami sesekali dalam shalat Dhuhur dan 'Ashar.

263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a Bedouin man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about his fasting. He mentioned the hadith, except that he said regarding Monday: 'That is the day I was born and the day revelation was sent down to me.'
263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang Arab Badui bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang puasanya. Ia menyebutkan hadisnya, hanya saja ia berkata tentang hari Senin: 'Itulah hari aku dilahirkan dan hari wahyu diturunkan kepadaku.'

264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ waited for some time, then the man asked again: 'O Messenger of Allah, if I am killed in the path of Allah while advancing and not retreating, will Allah forgive my sins?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If you are killed in the path of Allah while advancing and not retreating, Allah will forgive your sins — except for debt, for Jibril told me that.'
264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ diam beberapa saat, kemudian lelaki itu bertanya lagi: 'Ya Rasulullah, jika aku terbunuh di jalan Allah dalam keadaan maju dan tidak mundur, apakah Allah akan mengampuni dosa-dosaku?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika kamu terbunuh di jalan Allah dalam keadaan maju dan tidak mundur, Allah akan mengampuni dosa-dosamu — kecuali hutang, karena Jibril memberitahuku demikian.'

265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was brought a funeral to pray over and asked: 'Does he have any debt?' They said: 'Yes, two dinars.' He said: 'Has he left enough to pay them?' They said: 'No.' He said: 'Pray over your companion.' Abu Qatadah said: 'They are my responsibility, O Messenger of Allah.' So the Prophet ﷺ prayed over him.
265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ dibawa sebuah jenazah untuk dishalati dan beliau bertanya: 'Apakah ia memiliki hutang?' Mereka berkata: 'Ya, dua dinar.' Beliau berkata: 'Apakah ia meninggalkan sesuatu untuk melunasinya?' Mereka berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau berkata: 'Shalatkanlah sahabat kalian.' Abu Qatadah berkata: 'Itu menjadi tanggunganku, ya Rasulullah.' Maka Nabi ﷺ pun menshalatinya.

266.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Beware of swearing excessively in trade, for it may sell goods but then destroys blessings.'
266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Jauhilah banyak bersumpah dalam jual beli, karena hal itu mungkin melariskan dagangan tetapi kemudian menghilangkan keberkahan.'

267.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah al-Salami (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Beware of swearing excessively in trade, for it may sell goods but then destroys blessings.'
267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah al-Salami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jauhilah banyak bersumpah dalam jual beli, karena hal itu mungkin melariskan dagangan tetapi kemudian menghilangkan keberkahan.'

268.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that they were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'If people obey Abu Bakr and 'Umar, they will be rightly guided' — he said it three times. When the midday heat intensified, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ appeared to them and they said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we have perished from thirst.' He said: 'There is no perishing for you.' Then he said: 'O Abu Qatadah, bring the water vessel.'
268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam sebuah perjalanan. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika orang-orang mengikuti Abu Bakr dan 'Umar, mereka akan mendapat petunjuk' — beliau mengatakannya tiga kali. Ketika terik siang menjadi sangat panas, Rasulullah ﷺ muncul di hadapan mereka dan mereka berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, kami telah binasa karena dahaga.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak ada kebinasaan bagi kalian.' Kemudian beliau berkata: 'Wahai Abu Qatadah, bawalah wadah air.'

269.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that they were on the roof of a house with him when he saw a shooting star. They looked at it, and Abu Qatadah said: 'We have been forbidden from following it with our eyes.'
269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka berada di atap rumah bersamanya ketika ia melihat bintang jatuh. Mereka memandangnya, dan Abu Qatadah berkata: 'Kami telah dilarang mengikutinya dengan pandangan kami.'

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about fasting on Monday. He said: 'On it I was born and on it revelation was sent down to me.'
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang puasa pada hari Senin. Beliau bersabda: 'Pada hari itu aku dilahirkan dan pada hari itu wahyu diturunkan kepadaku.'

271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was giving a sermon and said: 'O people seeking Allah's mercy, they went forth and met the enemy. Zayd was martyred — seek forgiveness for him.' The people sought forgiveness for him. Then Ja'far ibn Abi Talib took the banner and charged the enemy until he was killed as a martyr — I bear witness to his martyrdom — seek forgiveness for him. Then 'Abdullah ibn Rawahah took the banner and held his ground.',
271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sedang berkhutbah dan bersabda: 'Wahai orang-orang yang mencari rahmat Allah, mereka berangkat dan bertemu musuh. Zaid syahid — mohonkanlah ampunan untuknya.' Orang-orang pun memohonkan ampunan untuknya. Kemudian Ja'far ibn Abi Thalib mengambil panji dan menyerang musuh hingga ia terbunuh sebagai syahid — aku bersaksi atas kesyahidannya — mohonkanlah ampunan untuknya. Kemudian 'Abdullah ibn Rawahah mengambil panji dan berdiri teguh.'

272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not curse time, for Allah is time.'
272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian mencaci waktu, karena Allah adalah Pengatur waktu.'

273.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'Will I walk with this lame leg of mine in Paradise?' — his leg was lame. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He and his nephew and a freed servant of theirs were killed on the Day of Uhud. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by him and said: 'It is as if I can see you walking with this leg of yours whole in Paradise.'
273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang sahabat (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Apakah aku akan berjalan dengan kaki yang pincang ini di surga?' — kakinya memang pincang. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia dan keponakannya serta bekas budak mereka terbunuh pada Perang Uhud. Rasulullah ﷺ melewatinya dan bersabda: 'Seakan-akan aku melihatmu berjalan dengan kaki ini dalam keadaan sempurna di surga.'

274.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he witnessed the Prophet ﷺ praying over a deceased person and heard him say: 'O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females.' Yahya said: Abu Salamah added: 'O Allah, whoever among us You keep alive, keep him alive in Islam; and whoever among us You cause to die, cause him to die in faith.'
274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menyaksikan Nabi ﷺ menshalati jenazah dan mendengarnya berdoa: 'Ya Allah, ampunilah orang-orang kami yang masih hidup dan yang telah meninggal, yang hadir dan yang tidak hadir, yang muda dan yang tua, yang laki-laki dan yang perempuan.' Yahya berkata: Abu Salamah menambahkan: 'Ya Allah, siapa di antara kami yang Engkau hidupkan, hidupkanlah dalam Islam; dan siapa di antara kami yang Engkau wafatkan, wafatkanlah dalam iman.'

275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would ask about a funeral: if people praised him, he would pray over him; and if they said otherwise, he would say otherwise.
275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bertanya tentang jenazah: jika orang-orang memujinya, beliau menshalatinya; dan jika mereka mengatakan sebaliknya, beliau pun berkata sesuai dengan itu.

276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever sits on the bed of an absent woman, Allah will appoint for him on the Day of Resurrection a serpent.'
276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa duduk di atas tempat tidur seorang wanita yang suaminya sedang tidak ada, Allah akan mengirimkan kepadanya pada Hari Kiamat seekor ular besar.'

277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever misses Friday prayer three times without necessity, a seal is placed on his heart.'
277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa meninggalkan shalat Jumat tiga kali tanpa keperluan mendesak, maka hatinya akan disegel.'

278.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Whoever gives his debtor more time to pay, or forgives his debt, will be in the shade of the Throne on the Day of Resurrection.'
278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Barangsiapa memberikan kelonggaran kepada orang yang berhutang kepadanya, atau menghapuskan hutangnya, ia akan berada di bawah naungan Arsy pada Hari Kiamat.'

279.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Prophet ﷺ urinating while facing the qiblah.
279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Nabi ﷺ buang air kecil sambil menghadap kiblat.

280.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The best horses are the black ones with a white blaze and white upper lip, with three white stockings and the right foot unmarkerd. If not black, then a chestnut with the same markings.'
280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebaik-baik kuda adalah yang hitam dengan bintang putih di dahi dan bibir atas putih, dengan tiga kaki bertanda putih dan kaki kanan tanpa tanda. Jika bukan yang hitam, maka yang coklat kemerahan dengan tanda yang sama.'

281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever sits on the bed of an absent woman, a serpent will be sent against him on the Day of Resurrection.'
281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa duduk di atas tempat tidur seorang wanita yang suaminya sedang tidak ada, seekor ular besar akan dikirimkan kepadanya pada Hari Kiamat.'

282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lead them in prayer and would recite in the first two rak'ahs of 'Asr and Zuhr two surahs and al-Fatihah. He would occasionally let them hear a verse. He would recite al-Fatihah in the last two rak'ahs and would lengthen the first rak'ah.
282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengimami mereka shalat dan membaca dalam dua rakaat pertama shalat 'Ashar dan Dhuhur dua surah dan al-Fatihah. Sesekali beliau memperdengarkan satu ayat kepada mereka. Beliau membaca al-Fatihah dalam dua rakaat terakhir dan memanjangkan rakaat pertama.

283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'A good dream is from Allah, and a bad dream is from Satan. When one of you has a dream he fears, let him spit to his left three times and seek refuge in Allah from Satan. Then it will not harm him.'
283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Mimpi yang baik adalah dari Allah, dan mimpi buruk adalah dari setan. Apabila salah seorang dari kalian bermimpi sesuatu yang ia takutkan, hendaklah ia meludah ke kirinya tiga kali dan berlindung kepada Allah dari setan. Maka mimpi itu tidak akan membahayakannya.'

284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'When one of you urinates, let him not touch his private part with his right hand, and let him not clean himself with his right hand.'
284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian buang air kecil, janganlah ia menyentuh kemaluannya dengan tangan kanannya, dan janganlah ia beristinja dengan tangan kanannya.'

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was giving a sermon and said: 'Shall I not inform you about your army that has gone out fighting? They went forth and met the enemy. Zayd was martyred — seek forgiveness for him. Then Ja'far ibn Abi Talib took the banner and charged the enemy until he was killed as a martyr — I bear witness to his martyrdom — seek forgiveness for him. Then 'Abdullah ibn Rawahah took the banner and held his ground.'
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sedang berkhutbah dan bersabda: 'Tidakkah aku kabarkan kepada kalian tentang pasukan kalian yang telah berangkat berperang? Mereka berangkat dan bertemu musuh. Zaid syahid — mohonkanlah ampunan untuknya. Kemudian Ja'far ibn Abi Thalib mengambil panji dan menyerang musuh hingga ia terbunuh sebagai syahid — aku bersaksi atas kesyahidannya — mohonkanlah ampunan untuknya. Kemudian 'Abdullah ibn Rawahah mengambil panji dan berdiri teguh.'

286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nafi', the freed servant of Abu Qatadah, that he went out hunting while not in a state of ihram and the others were in ihram. He caught a wild donkey and the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Do you have any of its meat?'
286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nafi', bekas budak Abu Qatadah, bahwa ia pergi berburu sementara ia tidak dalam keadaan ihram dan yang lainnya sedang ihram. Ia menangkap keledai liar dan Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah kamu memiliki sebagian dagingnya?'

287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered ihram and he did not. He said: 'I would gallop my horse for a distance and then walk it. In the middle of the night I met a man from Banu Ghifar and asked: Where did you leave the Messenger of Allah ﷺ? He said: I left him at Ti'hn, in the direction of al-Suqya. I caught up with him and said: O Messenger of Allah, your companions send you their greetings and Allah's mercy.'
287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berihram sementara ia tidak. Ia berkata: 'Aku menggalop kudaku sejauh satu jarak kemudian berjalan pelan. Di tengah malam aku bertemu seorang lelaki dari Banu Ghifar dan bertanya: Di mana kamu meninggalkan Rasulullah ﷺ? Ia berkata: Aku meninggalkan beliau di Ti'hn, ke arah al-Suqya. Aku menyusul beliau dan berkata: Ya Rasulullah, sahabat-sahabat engkau menyampaikan salam dan rahmat Allah kepada engkau.'

288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in the first two rak'ahs of the Zuhr prayer and let them hear a verse occasionally. He would lengthen the first rak'ah and shorten the second. He used to do the same in the Fajr prayer, lengthening the first.
288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam dua rakaat pertama shalat Dhuhur dan sesekali memperdengarkan satu ayat kepada mereka. Beliau memanjangkan rakaat pertama dan memendekkan yang kedua. Beliau juga melakukan hal yang sama dalam shalat Subuh, memanjangkan yang pertama.

289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Beware of swearing excessively in trade, for it may sell goods but then destroys blessings.'
289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jauhilah banyak bersumpah dalam jual beli, karena hal itu mungkin melariskan dagangan tetapi kemudian menghilangkan keberkahan.'

290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was brought a funeral in which a debt of eighteen or nineteen dirhams was owed. Abu Qatadah said: 'I will stand guarantor.' He said: 'With full repayment?' He said: 'Yes, with full repayment.' So the Prophet ﷺ prayed over the man.
290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ dibawa sebuah jenazah yang memiliki hutang delapan belas atau sembilan belas dirham. Abu Qatadah berkata: 'Aku akan menjadi penjamin.' Beliau bertanya: 'Dengan pelunasan penuh?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, dengan pelunasan penuh.' Maka Nabi ﷺ pun menshalati lelaki itu.

291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he hunted a wild donkey while not in ihram while the others were in ihram. They ate from it and then felt uneasy. He asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Did you signal, help, or hunt it?' Shu'bah said: 'I do not know if he said helped or hunted.' They said no, and so he commanded them to eat it.
291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berburu keledai liar sementara ia tidak dalam ihram sedangkan yang lainnya sedang ihram. Mereka memakannya kemudian merasa tidak nyaman. Ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentangnya, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah kalian memberi isyarat, membantu, atau memburunya?' Shu'bah berkata: 'Aku tidak tahu apakah beliau mengatakan membantu atau memburu.' Mereka menjawab tidak, maka beliau pun memerintahkan mereka untuk memakannya.

292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that while they were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey, the Prophet ﷺ established the prayer and led the Fajr prayer, then said: 'If people obeyed Abu Bakr and 'Umar, they did good for themselves and acted rightly. If they went against them, they harmed themselves.' Abu Bakr and 'Umar, when they missed the Prophet ﷺ, went searching for water.
292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika mereka bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam sebuah perjalanan, Nabi ﷺ menegakkan shalat dan mengimami shalat Subuh, kemudian bersabda: 'Jika orang-orang menaati Abu Bakr dan 'Umar, mereka berbuat baik untuk diri mereka sendiri dan bertindak benar. Jika mereka menentang keduanya, mereka membahayakan diri sendiri.' Abu Bakr dan 'Umar, ketika mereka kehilangan Nabi ﷺ, pergi mencari air.

293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by a funeral and said: 'One who is resting and one from whom others are resting.' We asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is the one who is resting?' He said: 'The believing servant rests from the toil and harm of this world into the mercy of Allah.' We asked: 'And what is the one from whom others are resting?' He said: 'The wicked servant — the servants, the lands, the trees, and the animals are all relieved of him.'
293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewati sebuah jenazah dan bersabda: 'Seseorang yang beristirahat dan seseorang yang orang lain beristirahat darinya.' Kami bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa yang beristirahat itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Hamba yang beriman beristirahat dari kepayahan dan gangguan dunia menuju rahmat Allah.' Kami bertanya: 'Dan apa yang orang lain beristirahat darinya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Hamba yang jahat — para hamba, negeri-negeri, pepohonan, dan binatang-binatang semuanya merasa lega darinya.'

294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The one who serves drinks to people is the last of them to drink.'
294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang menuangkan minuman untuk suatu kaum adalah yang terakhir dari mereka minum.'

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you enters the mosque, let him pray two rak'ahs before sitting.'
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian masuk masjid, hendaklah ia shalat dua rakaat sebelum duduk.'

296.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ carrying Umamah bint Zaynab on his shoulder. When he bowed and prostrated, he would put her down; and when he stood, he would carry her.'
296.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menggendong Umamah binti Zainab di atas bahunya. Ketika ruku dan sujud, beliau meletakkannya; dan ketika berdiri, beliau menggendongnya.'

297.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he tilted the vessel for the cat to drink. Kabshah saw him and he said: 'Are you surprised, O my niece?' She said: 'Yes.' He said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: It is not impure; it is among those who go around among you — those who circulate among you.'
297.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia memiringkan wadah agar kucing bisa minum. Kabsyah melihatnya dan ia berkata: 'Apakah kamu heran, wahai keponakanku?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Kucing itu tidak najis; ia termasuk hewan yang berkeliaran di antara kalian — mereka yang beredar di sekitar kalian.'

298.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about his fasting and became angry. 'Umar said: 'We are pleased with Allah as our Lord, with Islam as our religion, and with Muhammad as our messenger.' He then mentioned the hadith.
298.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang puasanya dan beliau marah. 'Umar berkata: 'Kami ridha dengan Allah sebagai Tuhan kami, Islam sebagai agama kami, dan Muhammad sebagai rasul kami.' Kemudian ia menyebutkan hadisnya.

299.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Salamah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever sees a good dream, let him only tell those he loves. If he sees something he dislikes, let him spit to his left three times, seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan and its evil, and not tell anyone. Then it will not harm him.'
299.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa melihat mimpi yang baik, hendaklah ia menceritakannya hanya kepada orang yang ia cintai. Jika ia melihat sesuatu yang tidak ia sukai, hendaklah ia meludah ke kirinya tiga kali, berlindung kepada Allah dari setan yang terkutuk dan keburukannya, dan tidak menceritakannya kepada siapa pun. Maka mimpi itu tidak akan membahayakannya.'

300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'While we were sitting in the mosque, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us carrying Umamah.'
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika kami sedang duduk di masjid, Rasulullah ﷺ keluar kepada kami sambil menggendong Umamah.'
